name: Michael T.
text: Incredible service from start to finish. They diagnosed my transmission issue quickly and had it fixed the same day. Highly recommend ASM AUTO Repair.

name: Sarah L.
text: Honest pricing and excellent workmanship. They don't try to upsell you on things you don't need. My go-to shop in Toronto.

name: David R.
text: Professional, reliable, and fair. They've been maintaining both my vehicles for years. The team really knows their stuff.
